title: Client Custom Name
description:
A Fabric mod to customise your name client-side. Works on any server, with support for custom Hypixel ranks.

Not affiliated with Hypixel
body:
A Fabric mod to customise your name client-side. Works on any server, with support for custom Hypixel ranks. Can function as a nick hider!

Has support for custom colour, chroma style, speed, size, brightness and saturation.

![Chroma name gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a07d935f0c8d879b345e88bd6df0f7ad9c20b84.gif)
